title: La femme fatale
writer: André Birabeau, Gérard Carlier, Michel Duran
actors: Robert Arnoux, Pierre Brasseur, Marguerite de Morlaye
plot: Fanny Le Doublond has a lover, Jean, and her husband is beginning to have suspicion. To calm him down she makes him believe that Jean dies of love for another woman and wants to commit suicide if his love is not returned. The two ...
